PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX bd: <http://www.bigdata.com/rdf#>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
SELECT ?team ?teamLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q1278513 p:P1343 ?statement .
  ?statement pq:P585 ?awardYear .
  FILTER(YEAR(?awardYear) < 2000)
  ?statement ps:P1343 ?team .
  ?team wdt:P6364 ?colorWhite .
  ?colorWhite rdfs:label "white" @en .
  ?team wdt:P6364 ?colorBlue .
  ?colorBlue rdfs:label "blue" @en .
  SERVICE wikibase:label {
    bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en"
  }
}
